message:
Improve home page mobile experience and video reliability

FrankenEye:
- Floating eye above the hero video is now visible on mobile
  (removed hidden lg:block), positioned at -top-12 right-4 on
  mobile, original md:top-[-80px] md:right-[10%] on desktop
- Scale reduced to 1x on mobile, md:scale-150 on desktop

Video container:
- Video element uses absolute inset-0 positioning for more
  reliable aspect-ratio-independent sizing
- Added MP4 source fallback (<source type="video/mp4">) after
  the WebM source, improving compatibility on Safari and older
  browsers that don't support WebM
- FrankenContainer padding changed from p-2 md:p-3 to p-2 lg:p-0
  for tighter video framing on large screens

Stats card overlay:
- Now visible on mobile (removed hidden md:flex, always flex)
- Responsive sizing: p-4 on mobile, md:p-6 on desktop;
  text-2xl on mobile, md:text-4xl on desktop; -bottom-6 left-4
  on mobile, md:-bottom-10 md:left-6 on desktop
- Label font size scales: text-[8px] on mobile, md:text-[10px]

Screenshot gallery:
- Shows 9 screenshots instead of 6 in the homepage gallery
  section (screenshots.slice(0, 9)), filling the 3-column grid
  more completely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -112,13 +112,13 @@ export default function HomePage() { {/* Full-Width Video — the centrepiece */}
- {/* Floating Peeking Eye */} -
- + {/* Floating Peeking Eye - Now visible on mobile with adjusted positioning */} +
+
- + {/* Auto-playing Rio Recording */} @@ -129,9 +129,10 @@ export default function HomePage() { loop playsInline poster="/screenshots/visual_effects_clifford_attractor.webp" - className="w-full h-full object-cover" + className="absolute inset-0 block w-full h-full object-cover" > + {/* Console Metadata Overlay */} @@ -142,11 +143,11 @@ export default function HomePage() {
- {/* Embedded Stats Card */} -
+ {/* Embedded Stats Card - Now visible on mobile with responsive sizing */} +
- 100h - Build Time + 100h + Build Time
@@ -194,7 +195,7 @@ export default function HomePage() { title="Screenshot Gallery" kicker="From dashboards to data visualization, file browsers to visual effects. Every screenshot is a real terminal render -- no mocked designs." > - +
); -} \ No newline at end of file +}
